source_pr.title: test: fix flaky test TestFailSchemaSyncer
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #48758

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?
if after schema validator restart, there is no `reload` within 200ms which is the ddllease before this pr, `schemaValidator.latestSchemaExpire` will expire, so later insert will fail with `schema changed`
https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/e0e8f89336e442e9cf6aa002469d291d075ace47/pkg/domain/domain.go#L1076
```
        	Error Trace:	/Users/xiedong/repos/tidb/pkg/testkit/testkit.go:157

        	Error:      	Received unexpected error:
```

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note

```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because after the schema validator/syncer is restarted, there might be no schema reload within the previous 200ms schema lease window, causing `latestSchemaExpire` to expire and later DML/commit to fail with “Information schema is changed”. This PR stabilizes the test by running it with a longer schema lease (10s) so the validator doesn’t expire before the next reload in slow CI environments.
fix_pattern: Increase schema lease for `TestFailSchemaSyncer` (run fail DB suite with a 10s lease instead of 200ms) to avoid timing-dependent InfoSchema expiry between validator restart and reload.

evidence: evidence: test: fix flaky test TestFailSchemaSyncer
